title: BEM-849 execute 848
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 13:57 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem848_read_847_and_process_or_repair.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='real_response_ready_to_process':
    status='protocol_processing_selected'
    next_action='parse real response and create agreed protocol'
elif ps=='queue_pending_continue_tick':
    status='tick_required_for_pending_queue'
    next_action='run fresh tick and verify pending queue processed'
elif ps=='runtime_exists_response_missing':
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem849_response_writer_retry.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-849 | RESPONSE WRITER RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: runtime exists but real response missing. Write explicit Decision response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem849_response_writer_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-849 response writer retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='response_writer_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real response'
elif ps=='dispatch_results_exist_runtime_missing':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem849_runtime_state_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-849 runtime state repair retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_state_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
else:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem849_explicit_real_response_request.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-849 | EXPLICIT REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUEST'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide real response with Decision for multi-agent system protocol. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem849_explicit_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-849 explicit real response request','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='explicit_real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real response'
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':status,'input_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_execute_bem848_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_execute_bem848_next.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Execute BEM-848 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem849_execute_bem848_next.json','governance/reports/bem849_execute_bem848_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-848 next action by queuing response/runtime retry or selecting protocol processing')
"""
No issue comments.
